name: navigation-menu
description: A collection of links and dropdown panels for site navigation

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { NavigationMenuRoot } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <NavigationMenuRoot
    :class="cn('relative z-10 flex max-w-max flex-1 items-center justify-center', $props.class)"
  >
    <slot />
  </NavigationMenuRoot>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { NavigationMenuList } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <NavigationMenuList
    :class="cn('group flex flex-1 list-none items-center justify-center gap-1', $props.class)"
  >
    <slot />
  </NavigationMenuList>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { NavigationMenuItem } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <NavigationMenuItem :class="cn('relative', $props.class)">
    <slot />
  </NavigationMenuItem>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { NavigationMenuTrigger } from 'reka-ui'
import { ChevronDown } from 'lucide-vue-next'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { navigationMenuTriggerStyle } from './navigation-menu-variants'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <NavigationMenuTrigger :class="cn(navigationMenuTriggerStyle(), 'group', $props.class)">
    <slot />
    <ChevronDown
      class="relative top-[1px] ml-1 h-3 w-3 stroke-[3] transition duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"
      aria-hidden="true"
    />
  </NavigationMenuTrigger>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { NavigationMenuContent } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <NavigationMenuContent
    :class="
      cn(
        'absolute left-0 top-full z-50 mt-2 min-w-[12rem] border-3 border-foreground bg-popover text-popover-foreground shadow-[4px_4px_0px_hsl(var(--shadow-color))] data-[motion^=from-]:animate-in data-[motion^=to-]:animate-out data-[motion^=from-]:fade-in data-[motion^=to-]:fade-out',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <slot />
  </NavigationMenuContent>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { NavigationMenuLink } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <NavigationMenuLink :class="cn($props.class)">
    <slot />
  </NavigationMenuLink>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { NavigationMenuIndicator } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

defineProps<{
  class?: string
}>()
</script>

<template>
  <NavigationMenuIndicator
    :class="
      cn(
        'top-full z-[1] flex h-2.5 items-end justify-center overflow-hidden data-[state=visible]:animate-in data-[state=hidden]:animate-out data-[state=hidden]:fade-out data-[state=visible]:fade-in',
        $props.class
      )
    "
  >
    <div class="relative top-[60%] h-2 w-2 rotate-45 border-3 border-foreground bg-popover" />
  </NavigationMenuIndicator>
</template>
